author: Matt Haig
review: A beautiful exploration of regret and the paths not taken. This book literally changed my perspective on life.

author: Andy Weir
review: If you loved The Martian, you'll adore this. The science is crunchy but accessible, and the friendship is amazing.

author: Alex Michaelides
review: The twist was unexpected, but the pacing felt a bit slow in the middle.

author: Madeline Miller
review: Lyrical and haunting writing. A brilliant retelling of Greek mythology.
